response.justification: Sarah Smith has extensive experience in software development and leadership, with a strong background in distributed systems, large-scale infrastructure, and technical mentoring. However, her experience with C++ (required for 8 years) is limited to a short period at National Instruments, and she lacks direct experience with cloud architecture and DevOps leadership. Her diverse tech stack and open-source contributions are impressive but do not fully align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, real-time systems at Optilyz)
Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience (e.g., organizing workshops, code katas, and dev-ops infrastructure at Altom Consulting)
Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages and frameworks, demonstrating adaptability and problem-solving skills
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ (only ~6 months at National Instruments, far below the required 8 years)
Lacks explicit production-level cloud architecture experience (preferred qualification)
No clear evidence of leading a large-scale cloud compute platform or owning ambiguous technical projects to completion

key_factors.factor: Large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience
